Name: Piercing Shot
Description:
Range: 6
Target: One enemy
Special: Targeting and effects from this ability do not trigger any
Triggered Effects granted by enemy abilities
Succeed: Deal **2 Fatigue**  
Critical: Deal an additional **1**$^a$ **Fatigue**
Upgrade a: Add half your POW to the additional Fatigue you deal on a Critical
Upgrade b: On a Critical, you may increase your Initiative for this combat by your REF

Name: Trick Shot
Description:
Range: 6
Target: One enemy
Succeed: Deal **2 Fatigue**  
Critical: Repeat this action immediately, targeting an enemy that has not been targeted
by this ability this turn as if you were standing in the space of the first target.
You have +**1**$^b$ **Bane** on the attack for each previous target of this ability this turn.
Upgrade a: On a Critical, deal additional Fatigue equal to half your POW
Upgrade b: Reduce the number of Banes applied for previous targets by half your REA

Name: Flaming Arrow
Description:
Range: 6
Target: One enemy
Succeed: Deal **2 Fatigue** and inflict **1**$^a$ **Burning**
Upgrade a: Add half your FIN to the number of Burning stacks you deal on a Success
Upgrade b: On a Critical, deal additional Fatigue equal to half your POW

Name: Point Blank Shot
Description:
Range: 2
Target: One enemy
Effect: Push the target up to **1**$^b$ spaces (you may move them any direction provided
each square of movement is in the same direction and leaves them further from you
than they started)
Succeed: Deal **2 Fatigue**
Critical: Deal an additional **1**$^a$ Fatigue and push the target up to an additional **1**$b$
Upgrade a: Add half your POW to the additional Fatigue you deal on a Critical
Upgrade b: Add half your REA to the distance pushed and the additional distance pushed on a Critical

Name: Prepared Shot
Description:
Effect: Choose one: Gain Aura 6, or Gain Aura 4 and apply **1**$^b$ **Mark** to an enemy within 6
Trigger: An enemy moves into the Aura
Effect: You may make a Ranged Physical Attack against the triggering enemy,
with **1**$^c$ **Boon** if the target is **Marked**. 
If you do, end this stance and you cannot take an action during your next turn
(you can still move and take a new stance).
Succeed: Deal **Fatigue** equal to 2 plus the stacks of Mark on the target.
Critical: Deal an additional **1**$^a$ **Fatigue**
Upgrade a: Add half your POW to the additional Fatigue you deal on a Critical
Upgrade b: Add half your FIN to the stacks of Mark you apply
Upgrade c: Add half your FIN to the number of Boons you gain against Marked targets

Name: Sniper
Description:
Effect: If you do not move during your turn your Ranged Attacks until the start of your
next turn have **1**$^a$ **Boons**. Subtract 1 Boon for each enemy in range 2 of you
when making the attack (this cannot cause you to lose more Boons than you gained
from this ability).
Upgrade a: Increase the number of Boons by half your FIN
Upgrade b: You only subtract Boons for nearby enemies in excess of half your FOC

Name: Strafe
Description:
Effect: You may take an action during your Move instead of afterwards, provided each
square moved during your turn is in the same direction. If you make an attack
your remaining Movement may not take you further from the target than you were
when you made the attack.
